response.global_analysis:
1. Transcription: Transcribed Japanese and English vocals accurately from Ninomae Ina'nis and Oozora Subaru.
2. Contextual Translation: Translated conversational Japanese into natural English, reflecting the playful banter.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are highly synchronized to the beginning and ending of each spoken phrase.

subtitles.original: おい。
All right, you shall now watch over the farm.
subtitles.english: All right, you shall now watch over the farm.

subtitles.original: Yes, cuz this is where we parted ways last time.
subtitles.english: Yes, cuz this is where we parted ways last time.

subtitles.original: Okay, I got, I got to work now. I got to work... Wait, I didn't even sell all of my carrots!
subtitles.english: Okay, I got, I got to work now. I got to work... Wait, I didn't even sell all of my carrots!

subtitles.original: I didn't sell all of my carrots! And my pumpkins. I came back, I didn't even get honey.
subtitles.english: I didn't sell all of my carrots! And my pumpkins. I came back, I didn't even get honey.

subtitles.original: Ah, how could this be? The inefficiency.
subtitles.english: Ah, how could this be? The inefficiency.

subtitles.original: イナ！
はい！
来たよ！
本当に大丈夫ですよ。見てください、ここ。
subtitles.english: Really, it's totally fine. Look at this, right here.

subtitles.original: え、何？
もうスバル先輩働いてますよ、うちのファームで。/ え！やばい！
subtitles.english: Subaru-senpai is already working at our farm! / Eh! No way!

subtitles.original: やばいやん！
やばい、うちのファームでなんか一匹脱出してやばいんだけど。
subtitles.english: Oh no, one of them has escaped from our farm, this is bad.

subtitles.original: あ、これ動きを見…せてるってこと？これ。
subtitles.english: Ah, is it... is it showing us its moves?

subtitles.original: はい！そうなんです！
マジかよ！ありがとう。ちょっとじゃあ、卵もらっていきます。
subtitles.english: Seriously?! Thank you. Well, I'm gonna take some eggs then.

subtitles.original: いいえ！大丈夫です！
イナズエッグください。プリーズ、イナズエッグ。
subtitles.english: Please give me Ina's eggs. Please, Ina's eggs.

subtitles.original: はい。
あれ？ / あれ？
サンキュー！
はい。
ディス卵はイナズエッグですよね？
subtitles.english: This egg is Ina's egg, right?

subtitles.original: いや、落としたりします…どうしようね。
subtitles.english: Well, if you drop it... what should we do?

subtitles.original: いやいやいや。
大事にしますよね？
いやいやいや。大事に、大事にね、してくれる人に渡した方がいい。サンキュー、イナ！
subtitles.english: No, no, no. I should give it to someone who will really cherish it. Thank you, Ina!

subtitles.original: はい！
や、なんか100%食べるエルフさんに…フレアさんに…
subtitles.english: Yeah, like, to the Elf-san who will 100% eat it... to Flare-san...

subtitles.original: 売ると思…
これ、俺のイナの卵って言って…
ですよね。
Maybe we should get like a stack of eggs and then put it up on the market.
subtitles.english: Maybe we should get like a stack of eggs and then put it up on the market.

subtitles.original: After I name the stack.
ね？
Ah wait, it's sign.
Cuz I don't really know how to sell on the market.
subtitles.english: Cuz I don't really know how to sell on the market.

subtitles.original: Is it similar to other things?
subtitles.english: Is it similar to other things?

subtitles.original: Oh, yeah.
Oh, Farm Support Bee. Jump boost.
subtitles.english: Oh, Farm Support Bee. Jump boost.

subtitles.original: Why, sell these again? Or do I breed them?
subtitles.english: Why, sell these again? Or do I breed them?

subtitles.original: Where's the other one? There it is.
subtitles.english: Where's the other one? There it is.

subtitles.original: Okay, what do I have on?
subtitles.english: Okay, what do I have on?

subtitles.original: I can breed this one.
I had to make a whole bunch of hop... I forgot.
subtitles.english: I had to make a whole bunch of hop... I forgot.

subtitles.original: Need whole bunch of chest.
How many do I need? I can make six right now. Okay.
subtitles.english: How many do I need? I can make six right now. Okay.

subtitles.original: Mmm.
